arts.ttl: Ancelotti: "The victory gives us confidence for the return leg"
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti spoke in the press room of the Santiago Bernabéu stadium and discussed Real Madrid ‘s victory in the first leg of the last-16 Champions League tie: "Today, the team ran a lot and worked hard, and two players made the difference: Rodrygo and Brahim . They were the best because they worked hard and contributed a lot to help the team, which was quite organised and compact.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti reveals the Real Madrid star that left him 'speechless' against Atletico
arts.sum: Fan favourite shines for Los Blancos to help give them edge in Champions League last-16 tie

arts.ttl: Atléti say late Mbappé, Vini miss left 'door open'
arts.sum: Diego Simeone said Real Madrid's failure to add a third goal in their 2-1 Champions League win over Atletico Madrid on Tuesday "left the door open" for his team to turn the last 16 tie around in the second leg.

arts.ttl: Rodrygo, Modric show why the Champions League is Real Madrid's competition
arts.sum: It was a familiar tale on Tuesday night: Real's opponents looked in control but, thanks to Rodrygo and Luka Modric, it was Carlo Ancelotti's side that walked away with the win.

arts.ttl: Brahim Diaz hands Real Madrid narrow advantage as Atletico turn to second leg
arts.sum: Real Madrid 2-1 Atletico Madrid: Diaz struck the winner after Julian Alvarez had cancelled out Rodrygo's opener

arts.ttl: Real Madrid's Underrated Players Outshine Kylian Mbappe: Takeaways From 2–1 Victory vs. Atletico Madrid
arts.sum: Brahim Díaz and Rodrygo stole the spotlight from Kylian Mbappé in Real Madrid's 2–1 win over Atlético Madrid in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Champions League tonight: Real Madrid land slim advantage thanks to ex-Man City misfit
arts.sum: PLUS: Borussia Dortmund didn't do enough at home to well-organised Lille, who will head back to France confident of claiming themselves a last eight spot at the expense of last season's beaten finalists

arts.ttl: Real Madrid's clash with Atlético will be their 500th European Cup game
arts.sum: Since the inaugural European Cup back in 1955, no other club has managed more victories, nor come through more knock-out round, nor been involved in the tournament on as many occasions (44) as Real Madrid . Real Madrid are gearing up to play their 500th game in the European Cup at the Santiago Bernabéu on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Real Madrid 2 - 1 Atletico Madrid, Post-game, Champions League 2024 - 2025
arts.sum: On this episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani and Lucas Navarrete — live from the Bernabeu! Kiyan and Lucas give their analysis live from the Bernabeu

arts.ttl: Atlético Madrid vs Real Madrid: Champions League 2nd leg times, how to watch on TV and stream online in the U.S.
arts.sum: Real Madrid will take a slender advantage into the return leg of their Champions League last-16 tie with Atlético Madrid, as Los Blancos bid to knock their city rivals out of Europe’s top club competition yet again . Viewers in the U.S. will be able to watch Atlético Madrid vs Real Madrid live in English on Paramount+, while Spanish-language coverage will be available on UniMás, TUDN and ViX.
